1	package agent
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"encoding/json"
6		"fmt"

12		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/config"

15	)

17	// PreClaimIntakePromptSource identifies the pre-claim complexity-eval
18	// dispatch in session logs and tests.
19	const PreClaimIntakePromptSource = "bead-lifecycle-intake"
20	
21	const readinessChecksSchemaPath = "cli/internal/agent/schema/readiness-checks.schema.json"
22	
23	type preClaimIntakePromptEnvelope struct {
24		Title         string                  `json:"title"`
25		Description   string                  `json:"description"`
26		Acceptance    string                  `json:"acceptance"`
27		Labels        []string                `json:"labels"`
28		PriorAttempts []preClaimIntakeAttempt `json:"prior_attempts"`
29		Depth         int                     `json:"depth"`
30		Parent        string                  `json:"parent,omitempty"`
31		Dependencies  []string                `json:"dependencies,omitempty"`
32	}
33	
34	type preClaimIntakeAttempt struct {
35		Status    string `json:"status"`
36		Rationale string `json:"rationale,omitempty"`
37	}
38	
39	type preClaimIntakePromptResult struct {
40		Classification string                      `json:"classification"`
41		Confidence     any                         `json:"confidence,omitempty"`
42		Reasoning      string                      `json:"reasoning,omitempty"`
43		Rewrite        preClaimIntakePromptRewrite `json:"rewrite,omitempty"`
44	}
45	
46	type preClaimIntakePromptRewrite struct {
47		Description   string   `json:"description,omitempty"`
48		Acceptance    string   `json:"acceptance,omitempty"`
49		ChangedFields []string `json:"changed_fields,omitempty"`
50	}
51	
52	// preClaimReadinessPromptResult is the canonical readiness JSON schema returned
53	// by skills that use the FEAT-010/ADR-023 outcome vocabulary.
54	type preClaimReadinessPromptResult struct {
55		Outcome    string                      `json:"outcome"`
56		Reason     string                      `json:"reason,omitempty"`
57		Detail     string                      `json:"detail,omitempty"`
58		Difficulty preClaimReadinessDifficulty `json:"difficulty,omitempty"`
59		Rewrite    preClaimIntakePromptRewrite `json:"rewrite,omitempty"`
60	}
61	
62	type preClaimReadinessClassificationPromptResult struct {
63		Classification    string                                 `json:"classification"`
64		Tractability      string                                 `json:"tractability,omitempty"`
65		Score             preClaimReadinessScore                 `json:"score,omitempty"`
66		Rationale         string                                 `json:"rationale,omitempty"`
67		Detail            string                                 `json:"detail,omitempty"`
68		Reasoning         string                                 `json:"reasoning,omitempty"`
69		Difficulty        preClaimReadinessDifficulty            `json:"difficulty,omitempty"`
70		ReadinessChecks   preClaimReadinessChecksPayload         `json:"readiness_checks,omitempty"`
71		SuggestedFixes    preClaimReadinessSuggestedFixesPayload `json:"suggested_fixes,omitempty"`
72		SuggestedChildren []preClaimReadinessSuggestedChild      `json:"suggested_child_beads,omitempty"`
73		WaiversApplied    preClaimReadinessWaiversPayload        `json:"waivers_applied,omitempty"`
74		Rewrite           preClaimIntakePromptRewrite            `json:"rewrite,omitempty"`
75	}
76	
77	type preClaimReadinessCheck struct {
78		Reason                 string           `json:"reason,omitempty"`
79		Verdict                readinessVerdict `json:"verdict,omitempty"`
80		Evidence               string           `json:"evidence,omitempty"`
81		CheckableBeforeAttempt bool             `json:"checkable_before_attempt,omitempty"`
82	}
83	
84	// readinessVerdict is the verdict reported for a single readiness check.
85	// Keep this coercion aligned with cli/internal/agent/schema/readiness-checks.schema.json
86	// so the shared producer prompt and this decoder accept the same payload shape.
87	// The intake producer may emit verdict as a JSON bool, a JSON string, or omit
88	// it entirely; UnmarshalJSON coerces all three forms to a canonical lowercased
89	// string so downstream fail-detection (failedReadinessReasons) can compare it
90	// deterministically:
91	//   - JSON bool true  -> "pass"
92	//   - JSON bool false -> "fail"
93	//   - JSON string     -> trimmed, lowercased value (for example "PASS" -> "pass")
94	//   - absent / null   -> "" (empty, same as a missing field)
95	type readinessVerdict string
96	
97	func (v *readinessVerdict) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error {
98		trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(string(data))
99		if trimmed == "" || trimmed == "null" {
100			*v = ""
101			return nil
102		}
103		switch trimmed[0] {
104		case 't', 'f':
105			var b bool
106			if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &b); err != nil {
107				return err
108			}
109			if b {
110				*v = "pass"
111			} else {
112				*v = "fail"
113			}
114			return nil
115		case '"':
116			var s string
117			if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &s); err != nil {
118				return err
119			}
120			*v = readinessVerdict(strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(s)))
121			return nil
122		default:
123			return fmt.Errorf("readiness_checks verdict must be a bool, string, or null, got %s", jsonKindName(trimmed[0]))
124		}
125	}
126	
127	func jsonKindName(first byte) string {
128		switch first {
129		case '{':
130			return "object"
131		case '[':
132			return "array"
133		case '"':
134			return "string"
135		case 't', 'f':
136			return "bool"
137		case 'n':
138			return "null"
139		default:
140			return "number"
141		}
142	}
143	
144	type preClaimReadinessSuggestedFix struct {
145		Target string `json:"target,omitempty"`
146		Fix    string `json:"fix,omitempty"`
147	}
148	
149	type preClaimReadinessDifficulty struct {
150		EstimatedDifficulty string `json:"estimated_difficulty,omitempty"`
151		Reason              string `json:"reason,omitempty"`
152	}
153	
154	type preClaimReadinessScore struct {
155		Present bool
156	}
157	
158	func (s *preClaimReadinessScore) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error {
159		trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(string(data))
160		if trimmed == "" || trimmed == "null" {
161			return nil
162		}
163		s.Present = true
164		return nil
165	}
166	
167	type preClaimReadinessSuggestedFixesPayload []preClaimReadinessSuggestedFix
168	
169	func (p *preClaimReadinessSuggestedFixesPayload) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error {
170		trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(string(data))
171		if trimmed == "" || trimmed == "null" {
172			return nil
173		}
174		if trimmed[0] != '[' {
175			return fmt.Errorf("suggested_fixes must be a JSON array")
176		}
177		var raw []json.RawMessage
178		if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &raw); err != nil {
179			return err
180		}
181		fixes := make([]preClaimReadinessSuggestedFix, 0, len(raw))
182		for _, item := range raw {
183			itemTrimmed := strings.TrimSpace(string(item))
184			if itemTrimmed == "" || itemTrimmed == "null" {
185				continue
186			}
187			switch itemTrimmed[0] {
188			case '"':
189				var fix string
190				if err := json.Unmarshal(item, &fix); err != nil {
191					return err
192				}
193				fixes = append(fixes, preClaimReadinessSuggestedFix{Fix: strings.TrimSpace(fix)})
194			case '{':
195				var fix preClaimReadinessSuggestedFix
196				if err := json.Unmarshal(item, &fix); err != nil {
197					return err
198				}
199				fix.Target = strings.TrimSpace(fix.Target)
200				fix.Fix = strings.TrimSpace(fix.Fix)

cli/internal/agent/readiness_classification_test.go
cli/internal/agent/readiness_schema_test.go

1	package agent
2	
3	import (
4		"encoding/json"
5		"os"
6		"path/filepath"
7		"runtime"
8		"strings"
9		"testing"
10	
11		"github.com/santhosh-tekuri/jsonschema/v5"
12		"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
13		"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
14	)
15	
16	func compileReadinessChecksSchema(t *testing.T) *jsonschema.Schema {
17		t.Helper()
18	
19		_, currentFile, _, ok := runtime.Caller(0)
20		require.True(t, ok)
21	
22		schemaPath := filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(currentFile), "schema", "readiness-checks.schema.json")
23		raw, err := os.ReadFile(schemaPath)
24		require.NoError(t, err)
25	
26		compiler := jsonschema.NewCompiler()
27		require.NoError(t, compiler.AddResource("readiness-checks.schema.json", strings.NewReader(string(raw))))
28	
29		// Compile also asserts the schema document itself is well-formed.
30		schema, err := compiler.Compile("readiness-checks.schema.json")
31		require.NoError(t, err)
32		return schema
33	}
34	
35	// TestReadinessChecksSchema locks the readiness payload shape behind the shared
36	// readiness-checks.schema.json so the producer prompt and the Go decoder cannot
37	// drift the way the parent wedge (ddx-f9ddaa68) did, where the producer emitted
38	// readiness_checks[].verdict as a JSON bool while the consumer parsed a string.
39	//
40	// Every verdict form readinessVerdict.UnmarshalJSON
41	// (cli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_hook.go:91-121) accepts must both
42	//   - validate against the schema (AC1/AC4: tightening the schema to reject any
43	//     accepted form fails this test), and
44	//   - decode to the canonical readinessVerdict (AC2: pass/fail/passthrough/empty).
45	func TestReadinessChecksSchema(t *testing.T) {
46		schema := compileReadinessChecksSchema(t)
47	
48		// buildPayload returns a full readiness payload whose single readiness_checks
49		// entry carries the given raw JSON for verdict, or omits verdict when empty.
50		buildPayload := func(verdictJSON string) string {
51			entry := `{"reason":"missing_verification","evidence":"AC lacks go test","checkable_before_attempt":true`
52			if verdictJSON != "" {
53				entry += `,"verdict":` + verdictJSON
54			}
55			entry += `}`
56			return `{"classification":"needs_refine","rationale":"check","readiness_checks":[` + entry + `]}`
57		}
58	
59		cases := []struct {
60			name        string
61			verdictJSON string
62			want        readinessVerdict
63		}{
64			{name: "bool_true_to_pass", verdictJSON: `true`, want: "pass"},
65			{name: "bool_false_to_fail", verdictJSON: `false`, want: "fail"},
66			{name: "string_fail_passthrough", verdictJSON: `"fail"`, want: "fail"},
67			{name: "string_ready_passthrough", verdictJSON: `"ready"`, want: "ready"},
68			{name: "string_not_ready_passthrough", verdictJSON: `"not_ready"`, want: "not_ready"},
69			{name: "null_empty", verdictJSON: `null`, want: ""},
70			{name: "absent_empty", verdictJSON: "", want: ""},
71		}
72	
73		for _, tc := range cases {
74			t.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {
75				payload := buildPayload(tc.verdictJSON)
76	
77				// AC1/AC4: the schema must accept every form the decoder accepts.
78				var v any
79				require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal([]byte(payload), &v))
80				require.NoError(t, schema.Validate(v),
81					"verdict form %q must validate against readiness-checks.schema.json", tc.verdictJSON)
82	
83				// AC2: the same form must decode to the canonical readinessVerdict.
84				var classified preClaimReadinessClassificationPromptResult
85				require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal([]byte(payload), &classified))
86				require.Len(t, classified.ReadinessChecks.Checks, 1)
87				assert.Equal(t, tc.want, classified.ReadinessChecks.Checks[0].Verdict)
88			})
89		}
90	
91		t.Run("malformed_kind_rejected", func(t *testing.T) {
92			payload := buildPayload(`{"kind":"pass"}`)
93	
94			var v any
95			require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal([]byte(payload), &v))
96			require.Error(t, schema.Validate(v), "object verdicts must be rejected by readiness-checks.schema.json")
97		})
98	}
99

1	package agent
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"encoding/json"
6		"path/filepath"
7		"strings"
8		"testing"
9		"time"
10	
11		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/bead"
12		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/ddxroot"
13		"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
14		"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
15	)
16	
17	// TestPreClaimIntakeRewrite_AllowsCompressionReplacement verifies that a
18	// replacement description can remove stale/noisy old prose when explicit
19	// commitments and durable anchors are preserved. (AC1)
20	func TestPreClaimIntakeRewrite_AllowsCompressionReplacement(t *testing.T) {
21		original := &bead.Bead{
22			ID: "ddx-test0001",
23			Description: "PROBLEM\nThe old intake system duplicated stale chat noise in every bead prompt." +
24				" Extra: references to slack thread 2025-01, per internal RFC-47.\n\n" +
25				"ROOT CAUSE\ncli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_rewrite.go:119 enforces append-only check\n\n" +
26				"PROPOSED FIX\nReplace substring check per FEAT-010 and ADR-023\n\n" +
27				"NON-SCOPE\nDo not change acceptance criteria validator\n",
28			Acceptance: "1. TestPreClaimIntakeRewrite_AllowsCompressionReplacement\n2. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green\n",
29		}
30		// Compressed replacement: drops noisy prose, keeps all explicit commitments.
31		compressedDesc := "PROBLEM\nAppend-only check rejects valid replacements per FEAT-010 and ADR-023.\n\n" +
32			"ROOT CAUSE\ncli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_rewrite.go:119 enforces substring containment\n\n" +
33			"PROPOSED FIX\nReplace with commitment-based validation\n\n" +
34			"NON-SCOPE\nDo not change acceptance criteria validator\n"
35	
36		rewrite := PreClaimIntakeRewrite{
37			Description:   compressedDesc,
38			ChangedFields: []string{"description"},
39		}
40	
41		got, _, _, preservation, err := validateAndApplyPreClaimIntakeRewrite(original, rewrite)
42		require.NoError(t, err)
43		assert.Equal(t, strings.TrimSpace(compressedDesc), got.Description)
44		assert.Contains(t, preservation, "FEAT-010")
45		assert.Contains(t, preservation, "ADR-023")
46		assert.Contains(t, preservation, "cli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_rewrite.go:119")
47		assert.Contains(t, preservation, "non_scope:Do not change acceptance criteria validator")
48		// Stale prose is gone from the replacement.
49		assert.NotContains(t, got.Description, "slack thread 2025-01")
50		assert.NotContains(t, got.Description, "RFC-47")
51	}
52	
53	// TestPreClaimIntakeRewrite_AllowsExpansionReplacement verifies that a vague
54	// one-line description can expand into a standalone executable bead when the
55	// added content is grounded in durable context and does not invent product
56	// semantics. (AC2)
57	func TestPreClaimIntakeRewrite_AllowsExpansionReplacement(t *testing.T) {
58		original := &bead.Bead{
59			ID:          "ddx-test0002",
60			Description: "add a pre-claim rewrite hook",
61			Acceptance:  "1. TestPreClaimIntakeRewrite_AllowsExpansionReplacement\n2. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green\n",
62		}
63		// Expanded replacement: adds PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE/PROPOSED FIX structure with
64		// durable file:line anchors. Does not add any Test* functions or acceptance
65		// criteria — those belong in the acceptance field.
66		expandedDesc := "PROBLEM\nThe work dispatches beads without evaluating whether the " +
67			"description is a fit-for-purpose implementation prompt.\n\n" +
68			"ROOT CAUSE\ncli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:600 dispatches without readiness gate\n\n" +
69			"PROPOSED FIX\nAdd PreClaimIntakeHook wired in the loop at claim time\n\n" +
70			"NON-SCOPE\nDo not add acceptance criteria in this description\n"
71	
72		rewrite := PreClaimIntakeRewrite{
73			Description:   expandedDesc,
74			ChangedFields: []string{"description"},
75		}
76	
77		got, _, _, preservation, err := validateAndApplyPreClaimIntakeRewrite(original, rewrite)
78		require.NoError(t, err)
79		assert.Equal(t, strings.TrimSpace(expandedDesc), got.Description)
80		// No commitments in the vague one-liner, so preservation evidence is empty.
81		assert.Empty(t, preservation)
82		// Expansion adds durable context.
83		assert.Contains(t, got.Description, "execute_bead_loop.go:600")
84	}
85	
86	// TestPreClaimIntakeRewrite_RejectsDeletedCommitment verifies that non-scope
87	// items, governing artifact references, named tests, or unresolved constraints
88	// cannot be silently removed by a replacement rewrite. (AC3)
89	func TestPreClaimIntakeRewrite_RejectsDeletedCommitment(t *testing.T) {
90		tests := []struct {
91			name    string
92			oldDesc string
93			newDesc string
94			wantErr string
95		}{
96			{
97				name: "governing_ref_dropped",
98				oldDesc: "PROBLEM\nfix intake per FEAT-010 and ADR-023\n\n" +
99					"ROOT CAUSE\ncli/internal/agent/foo.go:10\n",
100				newDesc: "PROBLEM\nfix intake\n\nROOT CAUSE\ncli/internal/agent/foo.go:10\n",
495:func TestBuildPreClaimIntakePrompt_UsesDocumentedReadinessSchema(t *testing.T) {

495	func TestBuildPreClaimIntakePrompt_UsesDocumentedReadinessSchema(t *testing.T) {
496		root := newPreClaimIntakeHookTestRoot(t)
497		store, b := newPreClaimIntakeHookTestStore(t, root)
498	
499		prompt, err := buildPreClaimIntakePrompt(root, store, b)
500		require.NoError(t, err)
501	
502		schema := compileReadinessChecksSchema(t)
503		var documented any
504		require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal([]byte(`{"classification":"needs_refine","rationale":"check","readiness_checks":[{"reason":"missing_verification","evidence":"AC lacks go test","checkable_before_attempt":true,"verdict":true}]}`), &documented))
505		require.NoError(t, schema.Validate(documented))
506	
507		lower := strings.ToLower(prompt)
508		for _, want := range []string{
509			readinessChecksSchemaPath,
510			"classification",
511			"tractability",
512			"score",
513			"rationale",
514			"readiness_checks",
515			"suggested_fixes",
516			"rewrite",
517			"suggested_child_beads",
518			"waivers_applied",
519			"verdict may be a json bool, string, null, or omitted",
520		} {
521			assert.Contains(t, lower, want)
522		}
523		assert.NotContains(t, lower, "confidence")
524		assert.NotContains(t, lower, "reasoning")
525	}
526	
527	func TestPreClaimReadinessPromptSpecifiesOutputShapes(t *testing.T) {
528		root := newPreClaimIntakeHookTestRoot(t)
529		store, b := newPreClaimIntakeHookTestStore(t, root)
530	
531		prompt, err := buildPreClaimIntakePrompt(root, store, b)
532		require.NoError(t, err)
533	
534		lower := strings.ToLower(prompt)
535		assert.Contains(t, lower, "suggested_child_beads must be a json array of objects")
536		assert.Contains(t, lower, "prefer a json string array of numbered criteria")
537		assert.Contains(t, lower, "decoder tolerates a single string fallback")
538		assert.Contains(t, lower, "waivers_applied must be a json array")
539		assert.Contains(t, lower, "prefer waiver objects with reason, criteria, and evidence")
540		assert.Contains(t, lower, "decoder tolerates a flat string list fallback")
541	}
542	
543	func TestBuildPreClaimIntakePrompt_ForbidsScalarReadinessChecks(t *testing.T) {
544		root := newPreClaimIntakeHookTestRoot(t)
545		store, b := newPreClaimIntakeHookTestStore(t, root)
546	
547		prompt, err := buildPreClaimIntakePrompt(root, store, b)
548		require.NoError(t, err)
549	
550		lower := strings.ToLower(prompt)
551		assert.Contains(t, lower, "readiness_checks must be a json array")
552		assert.Contains(t, lower, "must not be an object or string")
553		assert.Contains(t, lower, "reason")
554		assert.Contains(t, lower, "verdict")
555		assert.Contains(t, lower, "evidence")
556		assert.Contains(t, lower, "checkable_before_attempt")
557	}
